mapper.sql:
select rr.refund_id, rr.refund_no, rr.order_id, om.order_no, om.contest_id, c.contest_name, om.participant_id, p.name as participant_name, rr.refund_type, rr.apply_source, rr.apply_cash, rr.apply_points, rr.actual_cash, rr.actual_points, rr.coupon_returned, rr.status, rr.audit_remark, om.order_status, om.refund_status, rr.create_time, rr.complete_time, rr.update_time,
cpt.coupon_name AS coupon_name, cpt.face_value AS coupon_face_amount, uc.status AS coupon_status from jst_refund_record rr inner join jst_order_main om on om.order_id = rr.order_id and om.del_flag = '0' left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = om.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = om.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join jst_user_coupon uc on uc.user_coupon_id = om.coupon_id and uc.del_flag = '0' left join jst_coupon_template cpt on cpt.coupon_template_id = uc.coupon_template_id and cpt.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select count(1) from jst_refund_record where order_id = #{orderId} and status in ('pending', 'approved', 'refunding', 'completed') and del_flag = '0'
select * from jst_refund_record where refund_no = #{refundNo} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select rr.refund_id, rr.refund_no, rr.order_id, om.order_no, om.contest_id, c.contest_name, om.participant_id, p.name as participant_name, oi.item_name, rr.refund_type, rr.apply_source, rr.reason, rr.apply_cash, rr.apply_points, rr.actual_cash, rr.actual_points, rr.coupon_returned, rr.status, rr.audit_remark, om.order_status, om.refund_status, om.pay_method, om.aftersale_deadline, rr.create_time, rr.complete_time, rr.update_time,
cpt.coupon_name AS coupon_name, cpt.face_value AS coupon_face_amount, uc.status AS coupon_status from jst_refund_record rr inner join jst_order_main om on om.order_id = rr.order_id and om.del_flag = '0' left join jst_order_item oi on oi.item_id = rr.item_id and oi.del_flag = '0' left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = om.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = om.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join jst_user_coupon uc on uc.user_coupon_id = om.coupon_id and uc.del_flag = '0' left join jst_coupon_template cpt on cpt.coupon_template_id = uc.coupon_template_id and cpt.del_flag = '0' where rr.refund_id = #{refundId} and rr.del_flag = '0' limit 1
